query:
-- พ.ย. 2024: rows ที่ backdate (created_at ไม่ใช่ พ.ย. 2024)
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(amount) as total, MIN(created_at) as earliest_created, MAX(created_at) as latest_created
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'ff365' 
  AND paid_at BETWEEN '2024-11-01' AND '2024-11-30'
  AND (created_at IS NULL OR created_at NOT LIKE '2024-11%');

-- มี.ค. 2025: rows ที่ backdate
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(amount) as total, MIN(created_at) as earliest_created, MAX(created_at) as latest_created
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'ff365' 
  AND paid_at BETWEEN '2025-03-01' AND '2025-03-31'
  AND (created_at IS NULL OR created_at NOT LIKE '2025-03%');

SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(amount) as total, MIN(created_at) as earliest_created, MAX(created_at) as latest_created
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'ff365' 
  AND paid_at BETWEEN '2024-11-01' AND '2024-11-30'
  AND (created_at IS NULL OR created_at NOT LIKE '2024-11%');

-- มี.ค. 2025: rows ที่ backdate
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(amount) as total, MIN(created_at) as earliest_created, MAX(created_at) as latest_created
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'ff365' 
  AND paid_at BETWEEN '2025-03-01' AND '2025-03-31'
  AND (created_at IS NULL OR created_at NOT LIKE '2025-03%');
